signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
signals.text: Japan FinMin Katayama warns of decisive action on speculation; 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains USD/JPY bid at 159.75. JPY COT LF net short −65,309; intervention risk on a break above 160.00. Carry dominates until VIX > 25; 160.00 is the key intervention threshold.

signals.title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: AUD/USD COT LF net long +41,675 vs HV30 at 8.2% and ATM IV at 9.4%; 25d RR at −0.14. Positioning stalling, late-trend caution signal. A LF delta turning positive would invalidate the caution read.

signals.title: EUR — G8 Outperformance
signals.text: EUR weakest G8 currency this week (−0.500%, n=7); USD leads at +0.442%. G8 spread: 0.942%. ECB 2.0% vs Fed 3.75% — 175bp carry disadvantage for EUR.

signals.title: GBP/USD — CB + Technical
signals.text: BoE 3.75% vs Fed 3.75% — 0bp GBP carry neutral; GBP LF net long +28,426. GBP/USD at 1.3466 mid-range; ATM IV 9.5% near HV.
